text:
I have weighed this matter on the scales of proportion. 

Using our established measure, the Half-Kelly benchmark for this edge is calculated as follows:
$$\text{Half-Kelly} = \frac{0.15}{1 - 0.46 + 0.15} \times 0.5 \approx 10.87\%$$

While the edge of $+15.00\%$ is substantial and the liquidity is robust (0.810), a maximum allocation of **10.87%** represents the absolute ceiling of justice. Given the 2.00% bid/ask spread and moderate-to-high volatility (0.580), I recommend a tempered allocation of **8.0% to 9.0%** to account for execution friction.

**Systemic Bias Warning:** This market demands a "YES" position on Bitcoin reaching $115,000. The Council must guard against systemic directional bias; we must not allow an over-concentration of crypto-optimism to unbalance the broader portfolio. I approve this trade only if our aggregate exposure to directional crypto remains strictly capped.
